Prandelli nails the situation Ranieri lived upon arrival at VCF

[b]Ranieri was virtually dismissed in mid-December in Anoeta but saved his head and made a Valencia CF champion after leaving the club huge institutional crisis. Now the situation is beginning to have many similarities with 97[/b}

The arrival of Cesare Prandelli to Valencia CF bench led from the start comparisons with the previous Italian coach who sat in the Valencia bench, and also with great success in its first stage, Claudio Ranieri.

From the beginning, we compared the arrival of Prandelli with Ranieri in its first stage. Both landed to catch a Valencia CF sunk in the standings after start stringing several consecutive defeats at the start of the season and after it had miserably failed the bet for the bench the previous summer.

Ranieri landed in a Valencia CF who had bet on a lover of good football coach, as Jorge Valdano , and had built a template according to your requirements. With many quality players like Romario, Carioca, Saïb, Claudio Lopez, Vlaovic, Ortega, etc. The 'Roman general' as he was nicknamed by the Valencian press soon showed that he was antagonistic to Valdano in terms of footballing ideas. Ranieri put together a team from the defense and for many parties used the 5-3-2 was the system that gave better results. Indeed, the system that the current coach of Valencia CF began using last Saturday in the Pizjuan.

Ranieri was not able to straighten the situation of the team overnight despite the good squad that had the equipment and the outlay had been in transfers and wages. In fact, in his first 10 days, which had played until November 29, 1997, he had conceded five defeats, two draws and only had won three games. The situation was bad that Valencia CF in the grass and the club was a tinderbox in offices with advice that was becoming totally contrary to the president, Paco Roig. On November 22 the Valencia team lost 3-1 at the Calderon and Mestalla next day landed at bottom club Salamanca. The story is already known by all. The Portuguese Pauleta scored the only goal of the afternoon and Mestalla 'cast' Paco Roig forever. There he finished the stage Roig as president of the club and only a week later changed the club's history in Anoeta. Ranieri arrived in San Sebastian and only goal Mendieta allowed to score a point saved his head into Italian before making a lovely second turn and start putting the seed to Valencia CF winningest its history.



Currently they begin to repeat many circumstances. The team walks plunged into a crisis of results like the one he suffered in that 97 and also the institutional crisis begins to be of considerable size. The fan begins to doubt much of the current project and the next two days will shape the future of the club . Yes where there is a clear difference is in the confidence in the coach. Now, Prandelli has total credibility with fans and has become the leader in all the club hopes to leave the distressing situation in which the entity is.

Ranieri arrived at Anoeta with continuity depending on a result and Prandelli will arrive in San Sebastián fully reinforced matter what happens in the next two games and the mission to find the key and reinforcements to lift the team in the second half of the season. Ranieri brushed and finished KO touching the sky with Sevilla Cup . Yes, the road was hard and complicated. Now Prandelli faces the challenge of turning the tables and to become the second Italian to triunda in the Valencia bench.

Valencia CF add a cold victory against Leganés


An isolated goal of Mangala in the first half to stop the ball decided a meeting without intensity that leaves the Valencianistas in the center of the table
Valencia added an insipid victory against Leganés thanks to a goal from Mangala in a play that stopped unbalanced a cold encounter in which the team of Voro played without the intensity shown in other encounters but that served to beat a loose Leganés .

The victory removes almost definitively the ghosts of the descent but leaves the club of Mestalla in a zone of the table almost without aspirations, as long as the soccer players continue showing this attitude to propose at home and to let go outside.

The losses by injury and sanction conditioned the eleven of Voro who returned to his system of three midfielders and joined Carlos Soler, with Enzo Pérez and Dani Parejo, a trio that worked well until the arrival of Orellana that influenced the system, recovering The figure of the midfielder and also giving entry to Bakkali in the starting eleven.

Soon the Belgian had his option to inaugurate the marker when after a series of rebounds the ball was left frank before the doorman. Bakkali looked good to Herrerín but crossed over the ball that went off on the first great occasion of Valencia CF in a game that had totally under control.

The match was icy, like the atmosphere of the stadium, in one of the worst entries of the season until half an hour Mangala woke the spectators with the first goal. A corner of Parejo, topped by Zaza to be pushed to the net by the French defender who was released as a scorer in this campaign.

The goal did not react the rhythm of the match, which was soporific because of the lack of intensity of both teams. The Leganés with hardly any weapons to disturb the Valencianistas and those of Voro without the spark and the desire that if they showed only six days before Real Madrid, but confident that with that rhythm was necessary to add the victory.

Who did not want to miss his appointment with the party was the collegiate, Vicandi Garrido disqualified the Valencianistas with a Sibylline referee both in the first and second half, which was more than evident in one of the last plays of the first part when With a yellow, Adrián Marin knocked down Bakkali but the referee did not want to expel him.

The match came to rest with a cool atmosphere and Garitano reacted by changing Marin, aware that he should have been expelled, but despite the bench movement the party followed the same tone with a Valencia CF dominating the clash but without depth to reach the second.

Carlos Soler was able to do it after a spectacular individual play, when he dribbled two rivals before handing over to Herrerín, but as happened in the first half with Bakkali, his shot did not end in the net and was cleared by the Basque goalkeeper when Held the goal in the stands.

Despite the bad part of the game, Voro encouraged the team a little with the entry of two players as Lato and Nacho Gil, who continue accumulating minutes and showing that the quarry is fully prepared to help a Valencia CF in need.

Valencia CF took the three points in a match without brilliance that makes him continue in a mediocre area of ​​the table. Of the players depends that the end of season is like the one shown so far, winning at home and letting go outside or if they decide to try to aspire to something else.
